name: We Buy & Sell Everything
description_short: We Buy & Sell Everything is a pawn shop located in Garden City, MI offering collateral-based loans and the buying/selling of merchandise.
description_long:
We Buy & Sell Everything operates as a traditional pawn shop based in Garden City, Michigan. The business model centers on providing quick access to cash through collateral-based lending, where customers can pawn personal items in exchange for loans. The company also engages in retail sales of previously owned merchandise acquired through their pawn operations.

The shop offers standard pawn shop services including accepting collateral items for loans and reselling merchandise. Operating hours are limited, with Sunday and Saturday hours from 12:00-17:00, and Thursday-Friday hours from 12:00-18:00. The business is closed on multiple days throughout the week, which may limit accessibility for some customers.

What distinguishes this pawn shop is its broad merchandise category suggested by the name "We Buy & Sell Everything," indicating willingness to accept a wide variety of items as collateral rather than specializing in specific categories like jewelry or electronics. This generalist approach may appeal to customers with diverse items to pawn.

Pawn shops serve as short-term financing alternatives but come with important caveats. Interest rates on pawn loans can be significantly higher than traditional lending, and failure to reclaim pawned items results in loss of personal property. The limited operating hours and lack of online services mean customers must visit in person during business windows to access services.
pros: Located in accessible Garden City, MI address with clear phone contact (734) 469-2459
Accepts diverse merchandise types based on business name, potentially higher approval rates than specialized pawn shops
Open on weekends (Saturday 12:00-17:00, Sunday 12:00-17:00) for weekend access
Extended weekday hours on Thursday-Friday until 18:00 accommodates working customers
Fast cash access through same-day pawn transactions without credit checks
No application process or debt obligations unlike traditional loans
cons: Severely limited operating hours (closed Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday completely) restricts accessibility
Website provides minimal information—no details on interest rates, loan terms, or accepted items
Pawn loans carry significantly higher effective interest rates than personal loans or credit alternatives
Loss of personal property if unable to repay loan within the pawn period
No online services or remote transaction options—requires in-person visits
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) without credit checks or income verification
Individuals with valuable personal items (jewelry, electronics, tools) willing to use them as collateral
People seeking short-term bridge loans until next paycheck or expected income arrives
Sellers of used merchandise looking for quick liquidation without commission fees
diagnosis: Best for customers needing immediate cash against personal items and willing to accept pawn terms, or those selling used merchandise for quick cash. Primary caveat: pawn loans carry high effective interest rates, and failure to repay means permanent loss of the pawned item; very limited operating hours (closed three days per week) may make accessibility difficult.
services: Pawn loans on personal collateral items
Purchase of used merchandise and items
Short-term secured lending without credit checks
